name: 9-Line Isicelo se-MEDEVAC
description: Ifomethi ye-NATO emisiwe yokucela ukuphuma kwezokwelapha. Idluliselwe ngokulandelana, imigqa 1-9. Ilayini 1-5 idluliselwa ngokushesha (okungabetheliwe kuvunyelwe). Imigqa 6-9 iyalandela. Ulayini olungile ongu-9 ungenisa inyoni emoyeni. Ongaphelele uyalibazisa.
